title: onosma irritans
intro: Onosma irritans, also known as the irritant onosma or Mexican gold poppy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Onosma irritans include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
